name: Tomato Bruschetta
recipeIngredient: then cut crosswise diagonally into 1-inch slices
2 Large Tomatoes, peeled and seeded, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast the bread under the broiler until lightly browned.
2. Combine the garlic and olive oil and brush over one side of each bread slice.
3. Spread the tomato mixture evenly over the brushed sides.
4. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
5. Broil for about 30 seconds to heat the tomatoes.
6. Sprinkle with chopped basil and serve.
